pages.text: The $(thing)Manasteel Staff$() extends Iron's Spellbooks $(thing)StaffItem$() — it casts spells like a vanilla staff but doubles as a Botania mana storage with a 50,000-unit buffer. Sparks can deposit into it, and {ManaItemHandler.requestMana} drains it during spell casts.

pages.title: Stats
pages.text: $(li)+20 Max Mana$(li)+5% Cast Time Reduction$(li)+10% Botany Spell Power$(li)+0.05 Mana Efficiency$(br)Repaired with Manasteel Ingots.
